blockers: portable core build currently targets only the FLOAT core library; FIXED variants and drivers are deferred

public_notes: BRender v1.3.2 public source was cloned outside the metadata repo and matched the recorded snapshot commit. The source tree exposes period makefiles and project metadata. The portable harness now configures with CMake, builds brender_core_float.lib with explicit period OBJS_C source lists in an external Visual Studio Win32 tree, and passes vector math plus BrBegin/BrEnd framework startup smoke executables through CTest. No generated binary or packaged release is committed.
